summary: Completed testing of NextHeir iteration 4 with 6 new features. Successfully verified login page luxury villa image, landing page Tips section with 7 cards and bold disclaimer, Developer footer with Naeem Sikilkar's photo/bio on all pages, and backend duplicate scenario functionality. Session management issues prevented full frontend testing of duplicate UI, PDF export, and color updates.

minor_issues.issue: Frontend sessions expire quickly during extended testing
minor_issues.impact: Prevents thorough UI testing of complex flows

integration_issues.issue: Session expires during multi-step testing, redirects to login

passed_tests: Backend: All 17 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Backend: Duplicate scenario endpoint (POST /api/scenarios/:id/duplicate) working correctly
Backend: Duplicated scenarios have '(Copy)' suffix in name
Backend: All existing functionality (auth, scenarios, simulation, AI chat) working
Frontend: Login page shows luxury villa image (not abstract)
Frontend: Login page image URL contains 'luxury private villa estate night'
Frontend: Landing page loads correctly with all sections
Frontend: Tips section found with 'Tips on How to Use NextHeir' title
Frontend: 7 tip cards present as expected
Frontend: Disclaimer section with bold text formatting
Frontend: Developer section with Naeem Sikilkar's photo from customer assets
Frontend: LinkedIn link points to correct profile (naeem-sikilkar-64238395)
Frontend: Developer bio text present and formatted correctly
Frontend: Dashboard shows Developer footer section
Frontend: Compare scenarios page shows Developer footer section
Frontend: All pages load without JavaScript errors
Integration: Page navigation and routing functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Session management: Frontend sessions expire too quickly during testing. Consider extending session timeout or improving session refresh mechanism. Unable to fully test: 1) Frontend duplicate scenario button functionality, 2) PDF export button on results page, 3) Text color updates (cream/sage green), 4) Bar chart diverse color palette. These features may be working but couldn't be verified due to session issues.
